title: Szymek's Grill Mod
description: Szymek's Grill Mod (previously The G.R.I.L.L. Project) is, as the name suggests, a mod that adds grill to the game.
body:
![grill wallpaper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ccc4a6743a0007be620fe0e40d2523a3e1ef2bc_0.webp)(previously The G.R.I.L.L. Project) is, as the name suggests, a mod that adds grill to the game.

[**Discord Server**](https://discord.com/invite/cgWSa3eZ8r)

<details>
<summary>A few things you might want to know before playing!</summary>

-The Grill Project v1.05, 1.055 and v1.06 work again, go to their changelogs for instructions

-If you were playing with Grill Mod before 1.1 mod release Grill will most likely disappear from your world due to changed ModID

-if you were using a version of The Grill Project before 1.05, your grill will likely disappear from the world after the 1.05 update (because of removing the grill from 1.04 and replacing it with a black grill)

-when you step on the grill while food is grilling you will take fire damage (items thrown on the grill will also be burned) [v1.02+]

-if you have any black iron ingots left, you can craft them back into regular iron simply by putting them into the crafting [v1.0-1.04]
</details>

Latest Crafting Recipes (1.07+):

![v4 - iron plate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bd537dec7501ad3f9c6d7c56c4f361268d0114e.png)

![v4 - iron stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7c174d78999c381ea722a9c341f008c888ca404.png)

![v4 - grill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a845741522f9d2dcff3c7bbee7f8950f42d8d04.gif)

<details>
<summary>Previous Recipes v1.0 - v1.06</summary>

v1.05-1.06 Recipes (uncraftable as required dependency mods doesn't exist anymore)

![v3 - iron plate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e1090d2db79fa0a44b91d8b4d537dfbf8e4211e.gif)

![v3 - iron stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1837efd5882148165b6f5fd9f990242219544525.png)

![v3 - grill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57555c6019e340aed3953ccec8d22a4b9b582631.gif)

v1.02-1.04 Recipes

![v2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e3a18c5aabbf68725afbe4d4ddb8d9bcc42b539.gif)

Black Iron Ingot -> Black Iron Plate -> Black Iron Block -> Iron Stick -> Grill (any wooden slab should work)

v1.0 - 1.01 Recipes

![v1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/991442bd8919db4261dff1b18f371fcc47bba390.gif)

Black Iron Ingot Recipe (black iron ingots can be crafted back into vanilla iron ingots) -> Black Iron Block Recipe -> Iron Stick Recipe -> Grill Recipe
</details>
